---
title: "Abdelkarim el Ghani"
subtitle: "Statistical Data Analyst | Neuroscientist"
toc: false
page-layout: custom
section-divs: false
format: 
  html:
    template-partials:
      - _assets/title-block.html
    css:
      - index.css
    include-in-header: |
      <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/typed.js@2.0.12"></script>
resources:
  - "_assets/**"
  - "images/**"
  - index.css
---




<!-- Hero Section -->
::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-content}
<!-- The background gif and styling are defined in index.css -->
[![](https://readme-typing-svg.herokuapp.com?font=Lobster&size=50&pause=2000&color=2D333B&center=true&width=512&height=100&lines=Hi+there!;Welcome+to+my+portfolio!)](https://git.io/typing-svg)

::: {.btn-container}
[Explore Projects](projects.qmd){.btn}  
[About Me](about.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}
:::
:::
:::
